description: woodland - the giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylishly eclectic overlays on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with cargos, chinos or washed denims and a checked casual shirt. Style this with a tonal belt.UpperTwo tone synthetic upper with leather overlays across the toe box, on the midfoot and on the collarCentral lace ups with elasticated loops on one side and metal eyelets on the otherOutsole reinforced onto the upper on the heel region with brandingPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with a curved midfootGeometric grooves on the forefoot and terraced lugs on the heelShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
